mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, compressing equity valuations and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window, or positive 20d returns occur in greater than 65% of rising rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing consumer spending expectations and triggering negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE growth is below 0.1pp.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising retail sales and falling housing starts indicates a shift in consumer demand from durables to non-durables, signaling economic resilience and supporting positive equity returns over the quarter.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields a negative coefficient in out-of-sample regression, or 60d returns are negative in greater than 55% of divergence episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the index of industrial production below its 12-month moving average reflects weakening manufacturing output, which reduces corporate profit growth expectations and drives negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 65% of instances when INDPRO crosses below its moving average, or the signal fails to predict returns during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation measured by CPI exceeds 3.0% while the federal funds rate remains below 4.5%, markets anticipate aggressive central bank tightening, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of triggered periods, or the joint condition shows no statistical edge over single-series signals.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls above 150,000 signals robust economic expansion, boosting corporate revenue forecasts and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.02 over a 2-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 50% of high-payroll months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based demand growth, which increases earnings expectations and drives positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative 60d returns in greater than 55% of cases, or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production alongside a falling unemployment rate indicates a synchronized supply-side recovery, which improves profit margins and supports positive short-term equity returns.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO increases and UNRATE decreases concurrently
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in greater than 60% of synchronized recovery episodes, or the signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark during recovery regimes.
